title: Japanese-Style Chicken and Pilaf Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious bowl filled with chicken, pilaf, and vegetables, inspired by Japanese cuisine.
instructions: In a small saucepan, combine soy sauce, rice vinegar, and sesame oil (if using). Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, then reduce to low heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
In a large skillet or wok, heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the carrots and green beans. Cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 3-5 minutes.
Stir in the cooked pilaf and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir in the soy sauce mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the chicken and pilaf mixture over a bed of additional pilaf, if desired.
Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced scallions, if desired.
